sentences.arabic: الْحِنَّاءُ تَقْلِيدٌ قَدِيمٌ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Kana je stara tradicija u mnogim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: Henna is an ancient tradition in many Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: تُرَسَّمُ الأَشْكَالُ الْجَمِيلَةُ عَلَى يَدَيِ الْعَرُوسِ قَبْلَ الزَّفَافِ.
sentences.translation: Lijepi uzorci se iscrtavaju na rukama nevjeste prije vjenčanja.
sentences.translationEn: Beautiful designs are drawn on the bride's hands before the wedding.

sentences.arabic: تَتَجَمَّعُ النِّسَاءُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْحِنَّاءِ وَيُغَنِّينَ وَيَفْرَحْنَ.
sentences.translation: Žene se okupljaju na večeri kane, pjevaju i vesele se.
sentences.translationEn: Women gather on the henna night, singing and celebrating.

sentences.arabic: لَوْنُ الْحِنَّاءِ بُرْتُقَالِيٌّ أَوْ بُنِّيٌّ دَاكِنٌ.
sentences.translation: Boja kane je narandžasta ili tamnosmeđa.
sentences.translationEn: The colour of henna is orange or dark brown.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى أَثَرُهَا عَلَى الْجِلْدِ لِأُسْبُوعَيْنِ أَوْ أَكْثَرَ.
sentences.translation: Njen trag ostaje na koži dvije sedmice ili duže.
sentences.translationEn: Its mark on the skin lasts two weeks or more.
